title: Alloy Wheel Manufacturing
entry_mechanism: PSAP Track 2 — International alloy wheel manufacturer JV with Ma'aden aluminium supply chain anchor
executive_summary:
Alloy wheels are manufactured by low-pressure or gravity die-casting of aluminium alloy, machined to dimensional tolerances, and powder-coated or painted. Saudi Arabia is the largest automotive market in the Middle East (1+ million vehicles sold annually) and the largest automotive aftermarket in the Arab world. All alloy wheels are imported — yet Ma'aden Aluminium at Ras Al-Khair produces aluminium alloy directly adjacent to this supply chain gap.

Node AU-1 is Phase I's most achievable automotive manufacturing entry: alloy wheel production using Ma'aden aluminium alloy, with OEM and aftermarket customer base. The manufacturing process (gravity die-casting, CNC machining, surface treatment) is well-established, and Saudi Arabia's automotive assembly ambition (AU programme) creates a domestic OEM customer. Alloy wheels are also high-volume aftermarket products — Saudi Arabia's 10+ million registered vehicles represent 20+ million wheel replacement cycles over a decade.

The global alloy wheel market was valued at $28.4 billion in 2024 growing at 6.3% CAGR. Saudi Arabia's domestic alloy wheel market (OEM + aftermarket) is estimated at $400–600 million annually — a substantial domestic demand base for a Saudi manufacturer.

companies.name: CITIC Dicastal
companies.rationale: Dicastal is the world's largest alloy wheel manufacturer with international JV experience and active Gulf market engagement.

companies.name: Superior Industries
companies.rationale: Superior Industries is a leading OEM alloy wheel supplier with technology licensing capability.

companies.name: Borbet
companies.rationale: Borbet produces premium alloy wheels and has international manufacturing partnerships.

companies.name: Maxion Wheels
companies.rationale: Maxion is a global OEM wheel supplier with technology and supply chain expertise.

companies.name: Enkei Corporation
companies.rationale: Enkei produces high-quality alloy wheels with international manufacturing partnerships.

partners.name: Ma'aden Aluminium
partners.current: Aluminium alloy production; some downstream conversion
partners.upgrade: Ma'aden automotive alloy (A356 grade) supply to Saudi wheel manufacturer; Ma'aden equity in wheel manufacturing JV; Saudi vertically integrated aluminium → alloy wheel supply chain

partners.name: Saudi Automotive Assembled Vehicles Programme
partners.upgrade: Saudi-assembled vehicle programmes as OEM customers for Saudi wheels; localisation credit for Saudi wheel content in Saudi-assembled vehicles

partners.name: KAEC Industrial Zone

partners.upgrade: Dedicated automotive components zone at KAEC; shared aluminium casting and machining infrastructure; Saudi wheel manufacturer as anchor automotive tenant
